mapper.select: SELECT p.id, s.id as subject_id, 'SUBJECTIVE' as card_type, p.content as front_text, p.answer as back_text, p.explanation, p.difficulty FROM subjective_problems p JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE s.category = #{category} UNION ALL SELECT p.id, s.id as subject_id, 'FLASHCARD' as card_type, p.question as front_text, p.answer as back_text, p.explanation, p.difficulty FROM programming_language_problems p JOIN subject s ON p.subject_id = s.id WHERE s.category = #{category}
